title: Moroccan Twice-Fried Tofu Tagine
description: A twist on traditional Moroccan tagine, this dish combines crispy fried tofu with the rich flavors of a traditional tagine.
instructions: 1. Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the tofu to the skillet and fry until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the tofu from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
6. Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
7. Add the Moroccan spice blend, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add the fried tofu back to the skillet and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
9. Transfer the tofu mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
